geographic_restrictions: Great Lakes basin (Minnesota, Wisconsin, Michigan, Illinois, Indiana, Ohio, Pennsylvania, New York, and Ontario, Canada)
project_area: Great Lakes ecosystem restoration, pollution prevention, invasive species control, habitat restoration, and community engagement
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements; projects must benefit the Great Lakes region and its communities
eligibility_summary: Open to government agencies, non-profits, tribal organizations, academic institutions, and private sector entities working within the Great Lakes basin to implement restoration and protection projects.
